entity.summary: Fluent ecosystem concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange implemented as a Uniswap V3-style market with current liquidity, fee generation, protocol revenue, and spot-swap volume.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies FluxFlow V3 as a Uniswap V3 fork deployed on Fluent and reports current TVL together with non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day fees, revenue, and DEX volume. A stable first-party public website or detailed protocol documentation was not recovered in this review pass, so URL fields remain unset and confidence is medium.

evidence.title: FluxFlow V3 metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Current protocol profile identifies FluxFlow V3 as a Fluent concentrated-liquidity DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day fees, revenue, and exchange volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: FluxFlow V3 DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: Structured DEX registry independently preserves FluxFlow V3 as a Fluent decentralized exchange candidate and corroborates the exchange identity.
